title: JCAddons
description: This mod contains features for the minecraft server JustChunks
body:
JCAddons is a JustChunks (DungeonExplorer) mod that seeks to enhance the user's experience with a ton of features (to come). 

# Config
You can edit the config by either using the ingame command `/jcaddons` or by using  [modmenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)

# Features

- Highlight decorated pots in dungeon room.
- Show how many decorated pots are left in the dungeon room.
- Warning above hotbar when there is still unopened decorated pots.
- Show cards picked during a run.
- Much more to come!

## Feature Suggestions

If you have a feature that you want to be added, please ping one of us (himeji & freck) in the [JustChunks Discord](https://discord.gg/eGZWa92UzS)
